title: senecio fontanicola
intro: Senecio fontanicola, also known as water senecio, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. In herbal preparations, water senecio is often used as a tincture or infusion to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
